heading: Authority to change working hours
label: 2112 Authority to change working hours
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)211246:382bSection 2112 provides the Secretary with the authority to regulate the working hours of civilian officers and employees of the Coast Guard to conform with the prevailing working hours of a port.

children.text: the total period for which overtime pay may be required under may not be more than 15 hours between any 2 periods of ordinary working hours on other than Sundays and holidays;section 2111 of this title
the length of the working day for the officers and employees involved may not be changed; and
the rate of overtime pay may not be changed.
